headline: Stocks Climb on an AI-Led Rebound
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +0.93%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.89%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +1.17%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +0.76%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on NXP Semiconductors, Raises Price Target to $305
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ:NXPI) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $265 to $305.
